provenance.source_corpus: Distinguishing reintroduction from recolonization with genetic testing

source_spans.text: Instead it appears that recolonization by Albertan fishers is responsible for the current CLM population.
Instead it appears that recolonization by Albertan fishers is responsible for the current CLM population.
Obtaining appropriate genetic samples in relation to reintroductions will help determine when future reintroduction is likely to be the best conservation initiative.

source_spans.text: Obtaining appropriate genetic samples in relation to reintroductions will help determine when future reintroduction is likely to be the best conservation initiative.
Our review of all fisher reintroductions demonstrated that 47% have been given a different reintroduction status once genetic testing for reintroduction success was performed
